_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: Colocalization of proliferative and Vimentin positive cells was found in the test eyes, suggesting the presence of C6 cells creating a tumor near the injection site
details: Successfully detected Vimentin expression with colocalization of proliferative and Vimentin positive cells in test eyes
